prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次依次为约16837名→15881名→18372名→18310名→19484名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约3600名；2025年基准位次约19484名，为近5年最高（位次数字最大）；该校在吉林省物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为70人，2026年计划仍为70人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招，竞争规模不变。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第162名持续上升至2026年第134名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强；2022年声誉中性/混合（投档线逐年下降引发关注），2023年偏正面（食堂服务好、宿舍条件改善）；抖音热度总排名第86位，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量中等；历史投档异常信号为2022年中关注（投档线从2018年起逐年下降），近年无明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估：畜牧学A、作物学A-，均为农林类核心学科，与该校农学、动物科学等招生专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，但该校相关专业（数据科学与大数据技术、电子科学与技术、能源与动力工程）招生人数有限；农林类专业整体热度偏冷；吉林省2026年高考总人数110868人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算物理类考生约80000人，较2025年物理类80421人基本持平略降，竞争环境稳定；四川农业大学位于四川省成都市，属跨省招生；该校在吉林省招生计划70人，占该校全国总招生计划比例较小，吉林省考生报考意愿受地域偏好影响一般。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、软科排名上升但抖音热度一般等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准19484名基础上继续小幅后移，预测最低位次约19514名，区间19014–20014名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 16837, 15881, 18372, 18310, and 19484, showing a fluctuating and declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 3600 positions over the past three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 19484, the highest in the past five years (largest ranking number); the enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province for Physics Category was 70 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 70 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, keeping competition scale constant.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science University Ranking has steadily risen from 162nd in 2021 to 134th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength; in 2022, reputation was neutral/mixed (declining admission scores over years drew attention), in 2023 it was slightly positive (good cafeteria service, improved dormitory conditions); Douyin popularity ranked 86th overall, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure; historical admission anomaly signal was moderate attention in 2022 (admission scores declining since 2018), with no significant gaps in recent years; fifth round of discipline evaluation: Animal Science A, Crop Science A-, both core agricultural and forestry disciplines, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Agriculture and Animal Science, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended socially, but the university's related majors (Data Science and Big Data Technology, Electronic Science and Technology, Energy and Power Engineering) have limited enrollment; agricultural and forestry majors are generally less popular; the total number of Jilin Province Gaokao examinees in 2026 is 110,868, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 80,000 based on the recent proportion of approximately 72%, roughly flat and slightly down from 80,421 in 2025, indicating a stable competitive environment; Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, involving cross-provincial enrollment; the university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province is 70 students, a small proportion of its national total, and Jilin candidates' willingness to apply is moderately affected by regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline in historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, rising Soft Science ranking but average Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to decline slightly from the 2025 baseline of 19484, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 19514, ranging from 19014 to 20014.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19014–20014, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 19000), you can focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors like Financial Management and Electronic Science and Technology; if your ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., around 20000), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
